tracks.meaning: a comfortable sofa or couch designed for sitting or reclining
a room in a hotel, airport, or club designed for relaxation and socializing
to recline or sprawl in a relaxed manner on a chair or sofa
to move about in a leisurely or aimless manner without fixed purpose
to spend time idly or lazily without engaging in productive activity
a loose comfortable garment or robe worn for relaxation at home
a public room in a theatre or cinema for waiting or socializing between performances
